## Success criteria

- [ ] Experiment script exists in `research/scripts/`
- [ ] Results are recorded in `research/results/`
- [ ] Failure modes are documented
- [ ] `research/findings.md` is updated

<!-- Any data handling considerations, privacy concerns, or safety constraints -->
